**By renu vinod**

* * *

The recent report by the Indian Express exposes the unaccountability and lack of transparency in the Employment Guarantee Scheme using the same methodology that was used by the grassroots Mazdoor Kisan Shakti Sangathan more than a decade ago to usher in the RTI legislation in India.

[More..](http://web.archive.org/web/20060202183053/http://blog.ccsindia.org/mt/archives/2006/01/the_proven_scam_1.html#more)
